chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-2029 of 2024 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of main case 23.10.2025 Agha Athar Hussain, Assistant Advocate General ************** None present for the petitioner, nor any intimation received on his behalf. Mr. Sarfraz Ali, Additional Accounts Officer, Ghotki @ Mirpur Mathelo, is present and files a compliance report, which is taken on record. He submits that the SAP ID of the petitioner has been created/opened, and that his salary will be released in the month of November 2025. In view of the above, it appears that the purpose of filing the present petition stands served. Accordingly, the present petition is hereby disposed of, with directions to the respondents to ensure that the grievance of the petitioner is redressed strictly in accordance with law. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
